title: Administrative Sanctions. Failure by LMAs and/or principals/employers to
content: 10 submit reports or to act on requests for assistance and/or complaints of seafarers and/or 11 their families shall warrant imposition by the Department of documentary processing 12 suspension or such sanctions as it may deem appropriate. 13 14
